title: CFP_1 – Research | Duke Kunshan University
text:
CFP_1
NSFC and Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation Collaborative Research Program on Global Health（全球健康合作研究） link to the announcement
NSFC Announcement of a major research program on the scientific basis of metallurgy of key metals (关键金属冶金的科学基础重大研究计划) link to the announcement
NSFC Collecting Suggestions for Major Research Program on Basic Theories and Key Technologies for Future Industrial Internet(未来工业互联网基础理论与关键技术重大研究计划指南建议) link to the announcement
NSFC Guidelines for cooperation and exchange programs with the Czech Academy of Sciences （捷克科学院合作交流）link to the announcement
NSFC and Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation Collaborative Research Program on Global Health全球健康合作研究 link to the announcement
Funding Areas:
Innovative vaccine-controlled release technology
Please check the specific requirement in the link of call for proposal.
Innovations in RNA vaccines in global health
Enhancement of vaccine protection efficacy and duration of protection through the optimization of RNA-based vaccine technology platforms to facilitate the development of preventive vaccines against priority infectious diseases in global health, including, but not limited to, malaria vaccines, tuberculosis vaccines, etc.
NSFC provide key projects in the field of Railway Transportation and Clean Energy Equipment（轨道交通与清洁能源装备领域）. There are 26 research topics in this area. Please check the link to announcement for more information.
Award: 1.5 million RMB to each grant, 6 grants, 3 years.
Eligibility: 1）Proposal PI must have relevant cooperation with foreign collaborators before. 2）Applicant shall have senior titles such as professorship or research scientist. 3) PI is undertaking or having undertaken 3-year or more NSFC projects
Due date: Please submit the proposal in NSFC system before June 21st, 2024.
NSFC Announcement of a major research program on the scientific basis of metallurgy of key metals (关键金属冶金的科学基础重大研究计划) link to the announcement
This major research program is centered on the following scientific questions:
Cultivation Program:
1) New mechanisms for the enrichment and extraction of key metal elements关键金属元素的富集提取新机制
2) A new approach to the separation of similar elements of key metals关键金属相似元素的分离新方法
3) New technologies for the ultrapure preparation of key metals关键金属的超纯制备新技术
Major Program:
1) New methods of extracting metallurgy from low-quality key metal resources低品质关键金属资源提取冶金新方法
2) New method for deep separation of key metal elements关键金属元素深度分离新方法
3) New method for ultrapure preparation of key metals (indium, gallium, germanium)关键金属（铟、镓、锗）超纯制备新方法
Award : 25 cultivation programs, 800,000 RMB per each for 3 years； 8 major programs, 3 million RMB per each for 4 years.
Eligibility :
1) Experience in undertaking basic research projects;
2) Senior professional and technical positions (titles);
Due date:
Please submit the proposal in NSFC system before May 28th, 2024.
NSFC Collecting Suggestions for Major Research Program on Basic Theories and Key Technologies for Future Industrial Internet(未来工业互联网基础理论与关键技术重大研究计划指南建议) link to the announcement
This major research program focuses on the core issue of the evolution of spatio-temporal relations and regulation laws of the interconnection of production factors in the future industrial Internet, and centers on the following three scientific questions:
Structured Organizational Mechanisms for Total Factor Interconnection全要素互联的结构化组织机理
Theory and Methods of Flexible Construction of Manufacturing Processes生产制造流程的柔性构造理论与方法
The principle of networked regulation of industrial and value chains产业链与价值链的网络化调控原理
The main elements of the Guide Proposal include:
The contribution to solving the core scientific problems and achieving the overall objectives of this major research program.
The main content of the research to be carried out to address the core scientific questions.
Expected breakthroughs and their feasibility.
A description of the subcategories of projects proposed for funding.
Please send an electronic copy of the “Guide Proposal” (Word format, see the link to announcement) to the contact person of the Department of Information Science by May 31st, 2024 via Email.
NSFC Guidelines for cooperation and exchange programs with the Czech Academy of Sciences捷克科学院合作交流 link to the announcement
Research Fields：Mathematics and Physics, Chemistry, Life Sciences, Earth Sciences
NSFC supports international travel (economy class airfare) of Chinese researchers to the Czech, and accommodation, meals and inter-city transportation. Czech supports the international travel expenses of Czech researchers to China and the accommodation, food and inter-city transportation expenses.
Award: NSFC provides 100,000 RMB per grant, and Czech provides CZK 600,000/grant.
Eligibility: 1) Proposal PI must be leading PI or the main participant in the on-going NSFC projects that lasts at least 3 years; 2) Both sides shall submit proposal to NSFC and Czech separately.
Due date:
Please submit the proposal in NSFC system before June 4th, 2024.
Feel free to contact RSO via research-support@dukekunshan.edu.cn , if you have any questions. Thanks.
